response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-01:10: Identified game-like pixel-art scenes. 2. 01:10: Song "XY&Z" starts. 3. Used search tool to find metadata and lyrics for "XY&Z" by Rica Matsumoto (Satoshi). 4. Mapped the identified song to the musical segment. 5. Included lyrics in the response.
response.global_summary: The video features a pixel-art character performing the song "XY&Z" on a virtual stage. The song's lyrics were identified as the opening theme for the anime "Pokémon XY&Z", originally performed by Rica Matsumoto (as Satoshi/Ash Ketchum). The performer in the video is a VTuber or digital avatar.

scenes.description: A sequence of short, non-musical scenes in a pixel-art game environment. Character is shown interacting with NPCs and gaining companions. Text indicates game-like interactions.
The character begins performing the song "XY&Z" on a virtual stage decorated with pixel-art elements and screens. The song continues until the end of the video.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey! Like the morning sun illuminating Kalos
(Nitro Charge, let's go hot!)
Come on! Let's proceed, we're always ready, OK
(Breaking through, ever-changing!)
Our overlapping feelings sync up
And become a bond that will never disappear
We can become stronger no matter how far
If it's us, Woh Woh Woh Yeah
Let's go Z!! A fiercely burning battle
Let's go Z!! A crisis is an opportunity
Let's go Z!! Desperate struggle, we will never give up
We will never give up
Hey! Even if any kind of wall blocks the road
(Always hit and break through!)
Come on! Let's go ahead, we're always ready, OK

Our overlapping feelings sync up
And become a bond that will never disappear
We can become stronger no matter how far
If it's us, Woh Woh Woh Yeah
Let's go Z!! A fiercely burning battle

Let's go Z!! Desperate struggle, we will never give up

Yes! Let's face it and go together, to beyond the dream
